content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — App schedules hourly repeating push notifications (`App/NotificationScheduler.swift:11-14`, `scheduleHourlyDeals`) and metadata explicitly advertises "alert you EVERY HOUR ... unlimited notifications, all day long" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:3), matching Apple's spam-push pattern.
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits using push notifications for promotional/marketing blasts at high frequency without clear user control, and this reads exactly like the "unlimited reminders" anti-pattern reviewers watch for. Verify there's a way for users to configure/limit frequency and opt out per-category, and tone down the marketing copy to avoid framing it as spam; otherwise expect a 4.5.4/4.5.1 rejection or follow-up questions.
